text:
Created attachment 216445
patch

Update to 0.12.6, builds on current with a specific set of default versions:

perl5=5.32 python=3.7 python3=3.7 ruby=2.7 pgsql=12 php=7.4 mysql=10.4m gcc=11 samba=4.11 lua=5.3 java=11 llvm=10

TODO: test if gcc=11 helps on other versions as well.
